subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Thy detailed letter, as well as thy flowing verses, were received, and they are evidence of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله نامه مفصل شما رسید و همچنین اشعار آبدار الحمدلله دلیل بر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
